privileged_info_summary: I have completed the PI audit for the gmat_env broken_leo_mission_diagnosis task. The GMAT script data is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh with injected orbital inconsistencies. I verified that the output path, script path, and all mathematical and programmatic boundary conditions (SMA range, ECC, INC range, DragArea, and theoretical RAAN drift) exactly match the strict requirements enforced by verifier.py and physical constraints of a 550 km sun-synchronous orbit.
